resources.string: You can easily book a ticket through our app. Choose your station, destination, and date, then complete the payment — your e-ticket will be delivered right away.
How can I activate my card?
What is the ticket\'s validity period?
Buy your tickets faster, track your trips, and enjoy an easier metro experience when you log in.
Buy your tickets faster, track your trips, and make your life easier when you log in.
Enable location to find your nearest station
Your precise location is used to show your position on the map, get directions, estimate travel times, and improve search results
Allow "AQ Metro App" to use your location?
Tap here to enable location and find your nearest station
The official app for faster, easier transit across Alexandria, the Bride of the Mediterranean
Select your destination from the list, or explore the route of every station on the map
Enjoy a fast, easy payment experience — buy your e-ticket anytime, anywhere
Buy Your Ticket With One Tap
We use your data to ensure the efficient operation of the metro\'s digital services and to provide you with tickets and subscriptions.
We technically monitor the app\'s performance to ensure no malfunctions occur while using it at the stations.

We may send you personalized alerts or promotional offers based on your trip history and preferences.\n\nTo activate your account, please visit the nearest Al-Mashreq Company branch with your national ID, or call customer service at 920000000 to submit a remote activation request. You can also visit our website for more details.
Our mission is to continuously improve our app and offer you new experiences. As part of this mission, we use your information for the following purposes:

To provide you with interest-based (behavioral) advertising or other targeted content: We may use automatically processed information for marketing purposes (to show ads or alerts that may interest you based on your preferences). We provide personalized content and... [source text cut off]

To improve, test, and monitor the effectiveness of our app: We use automatically processed information to better understand user behavior and trends, detect potential outages or technical issues, and to operate, protect, improve, and develop our app.
To provide our service: We use the information you provide, along with information processed automatically, to deliver all the requested services to you (such as ticket booking and trip tracking).
Please select a station to continue
If you run into any issue or have a question, you can reach our support team directly and easily.
I agree to Alexandria Metro\'s Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

Welcome, and thank you for your interest in Abu Qir Metro, along with its related websites, networks, applications, mobile apps, and other services we provide. These Terms of Service constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Abu Qir Metro regarding your use of the Service.

Please read the following terms carefully.

By using the app — whether by downloading, installing, accessing, or otherwise using the Service — you acknowledge that you have read and understood, and as a condition of your use of the Service, you agree to be bound by the following Terms and Conditions, including Abu Qir Metro's Privacy Policy (collectively, the "Terms").

If you do not qualify, or do not agree to these Terms, you do not have our permission to use the Service. Your use of the Service, and our provision of the Service to you, constitutes an agreement between Abu Qir Metro and you to comply with these Terms.

Consent statement: By tapping "Agree," you acknowledge that you are bound by Abu Qir Metro's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
I agree to occasionally receive emails with best practices, tips, and other updates.
Scan this code at the designated location
